en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains valid Guatemalan Social Security documentation in the Guatemala Social Security IGSS Applicability Assessment questionnaire.\t
Guatemala Social Security IGSS Registration Certificate

A company can obtain its IGSS registration certificate or formal acknowledgement of employer affiliation directly through the Guatemalan Social Security Institute (IGSS). This documentation is issued upon successful registration of the company as an employer and can be requested, printed, or downloaded from official IGSS online channels.
Please upload your company’s completed and submitted Employer Registration Certificate to confirm compliance with Guatemala’s Social Security requirements.
